content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Reposts". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/522/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers representing the array of reposts.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of people required to make the given number of reposts.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a graph to model the reposts and find the minimum number of people required.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
reposts = list(map(int, input().split()))
people = sum(1 for rep in reposts if rep > 0)
print(people)
